_comment_top: Pinned versions of external native dependencies fetched by scripts/fetch-xr-deps.{ps1,sh}. Bump here, not in the scripts. Files extract under xr-deps/<dep>/ relative to the repo root.
_comment_license: License: this metadata file is GPL-3.0-or-later. The downloaded payloads retain their upstream licenses (Apache-2.0 for OpenCV, MIT for ONNX Runtime, BSL-1.0 for the hand-tracking models per upstream Monado).

hand_tracking_models._comment: Two ONNX files; cloned via git LFS from Collabora. If you hit LFS quota, mirror these to your own GitHub Release and edit the URLs.
